samples.xml_description:
<module id="counter_12">
    <description>Counter from 0 to 11, controlled by valid_count.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low)</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal</input>
        <input id="valid_count">Enable counting</input>
        <output id="out" width_description="[3:0]">Current count</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="STATE_IDLE" value="2'b00">Idle state</enum>
        <enum id="STATE_COUNT" value="2'b01">Counting state</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">State of the FSM</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="combinational_logic" width_description="[1:0]">Next state of the FSM</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            <if condition="rst_n == 0">
                <set value="4'b0000" select="@output"/>
            </if>
            <else>
                <set value="next_state" select="@output"/>
            </else>
        </sequential>
        <combinational>
            <if condition="valid_count == 1">
                <if condition="out == 4'd11">
                    <set value="4'b0000" select="next_state"/>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <set value="out + 1" select="next_state"/>
                </else>
            </if>
            <else>
                <set value="out" select="next_state"/>
            </else>
        </combinational>
    </implementation>
</module>
